fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Search Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the cash flow forecast.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional description of a forecast.

fields.name: Consider Discount
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to include the cash discounts that are assigned in entries and documents in cash flow forecast.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the forecast was created.

fields.name: Created By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who created the forecast.

fields.name: Manual Payments To
fields.tooltip: Specifies a starting date to which manual revenue/expenses should be included in cash flow forecast.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies the comment for the record.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Manual Payments From
fields.tooltip: Specifies a starting date from which manual revenue/expenses should be included in cash flow forecast.

fields.name: G/L Budget From
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date from which you want to use the budget values from the general ledger in the cash flow forecast.

fields.name: G/L Budget To
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date to which you want to use the budget values from the general ledger in the cash flow forecast.

fields.name: Consider CF Payment Terms
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to use cash flow payment terms for cash flow forecast. Cash flow payment terms overrule the standard payment terms that you have defined for customers, vendors, and orders. They also overrule the payment terms that you have manually entered on entries or documents.

fields.name: Consider Pmt. Disc. Tol. Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the payment discount tolerance date is considered when the cash flow date is calculated. If the check box is cleared, the due date or payment discount date from the customer and vendor ledger entries and the sales order or purchase order are used.

fields.name: Consider Pmt. Tol. Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the payment tolerance amounts from the posted customer and vendor ledger entries are used in the cash flow forecast. If the check box is cleared, the amount without any payment tolerance amount from the customer and vendor ledger entries are used.

fields.name: Overdue CF Dates to Work Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to change overdue dates to the current work date for the cash flow forecast. Choose the field if this forecast is shown in the forecast chart.

fields.name: Default G/L Budget Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger budget to be used when recalculating the cash flow forecast.
